title: Cron job in /etc/cron.d never runs -- no errors anywhere
description_md:
`/etc/cron.d/nightly-sync` defines a single job that should run every 5 minutes, but it never has -- `/var/log/nightly-sync.done` doesn't exist, and there's nothing wrong-looking about the line itself. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), figure out why cron won't accept this file's job, and fix it.

You're done when the crontab file is actually valid the way cron requires.
